content: Scroll-driven animations (animation-timeline: view()/scroll()) support: Chrome/Edge 115+ (Jul 2023) unflagged, Safari 26 (Sep 2025) shipped, Firefox 152 (Jun 2026) still behind layout.css.scroll-driven-animations.enabled flag in stable (on in Nightly, Interop 2026 priority). NOT Baseline yet. Progressive enhancement via @supports (animation-timeline: view()) is mandatory; a static/JS fallback is required for Firefox stable users.
